inputs.diff:
--- a/config/helpers.go
+++ b/config/helpers.go
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+package config
+
+import (
+	"fmt"
+	"time"
+)
+
+// ParseDuration parses a duration string and returns a time.Duration.
+func ParseDuration(s string) (time.Duration, error) {
+	d, err := time.ParseDuration(s)
+	if err != nil {
+		return 0, fmt.Errorf("parsing duration %q: %w", s, err)
+	}
+	return d, nil
+}
inputs.plan: Add ParseDuration helper that wraps time.ParseDuration with error context.
